title: Create attendance from a classroom photo review
description: This verifies that a teacher can upload a classroom photo, review detected students, and create an attendance record.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the teacher username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the teacher password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Select a subject
Upload a classroom photo
Review the detected students
Confirm the attendance record
Verify a new attendance record is displayed

title: Log in and choose a subject before taking attendance
description: This verifies that a teacher can authenticate, reach the dashboard, and select a subject before starting attendance capture.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the teacher username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the teacher password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Select a subject
Verify the selected subject is shown on the teacher dashboard

title: Register a new teacher account from the home page
description: This verifies that a teacher can create a new account from the landing page and receive a successful confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Teacher Portal entry point
Open the registration form
Fill in a unique username
Fill in the teacher name field
Fill in a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify a successful account creation confirmation is visible

title: Complete student enrollment with face and voice samples
description: This verifies that a student can enter their name, capture biometric samples, submit enrollment, and see a saved profile confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Student Portal entry point
Provide the student name
Capture a face sample using the camera
Capture a voice sample using the microphone
Submit the enrollment information
Verify the student profile registration confirmation is visible

title: Access the teacher dashboard with a newly registered account
description: This verifies that a newly created teacher can log in and reach the teacher dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Teacher Portal entry point
Open the registration form
Fill in a unique username
Fill in the teacher name field
Fill in a valid password
Submit the registration form
Log in with the newly created teacher credentials
Verify the teacher dashboard is displayed

title: Review unrecognized students before confirming attendance
description: This verifies that a teacher can inspect a mixed recognition result and still complete attendance after manual review.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the teacher username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the teacher password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Select a subject
Upload a classroom photo with multiple students
Review the detected and unrecognized students
Confirm the attendance record
Verify the attendance review includes both recognized and unrecognized students

title: Reject teacher registration when required fields are missing
description: This verifies that the teacher registration form blocks submission until the required username, name, and password fields are completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Teacher Portal entry point
Open the registration form
Submit the registration form
Verify validation errors for the required fields are visible

title: Prevent student enrollment when the name is missing
description: This verifies that the student enrollment form requires a name before biometric capture and submission can succeed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Student Portal entry point
Capture a face sample using the camera
Capture a voice sample using the microphone
Submit the enrollment information
Verify a validation error for the missing name is visible

title: Recover from camera or microphone permission denial during student enrollment
description: This verifies that a student can see a permission issue during biometric capture and then successfully retry enrollment after granting access.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Student Portal entry point
Provide the student name
Attempt to capture a face sample without camera permission
Attempt to capture a voice sample without microphone permission
Grant the required permissions and capture the samples again
Submit the enrollment information
Verify the student profile registration confirmation is visible

title: Retry enrollment after a poor-quality face capture
description: This verifies that a student can recover from a failed face recognition attempt caused by poor capture quality and complete enrollment successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Student Portal entry point
Provide the student name
Capture a low-quality face sample using the camera
Capture a better face sample using the camera
Capture a voice sample using the microphone
Submit the enrollment information
Verify the student profile registration confirmation is visible
